metadata.title: ACME Cloud Platform — Plan of Action & Milestones

risks.title: Risk: Session Timeout Not Configured for Web Application
risks.description: Risk associated with session timeout not configured for web application.

risks.title: Risk: Encryption Key Rotation Not Automated
risks.description: Risk associated with encryption key rotation not automated.

risks.title: Risk: Missing Vulnerability Scan Coverage for Container Images
risks.description: Risk associated with missing vulnerability scan coverage for container images.

risks.title: Risk: Incomplete Audit Log Retention Configuration
risks.description: Risk associated with incomplete audit log retention configuration.

risks.title: Risk: Multifactor Authentication Not Enforced for All Privileged Users
risks.description: Risk associated with multifactor authentication not enforced for all privileged users.

risks.title: Risk: Incident Response Plan Not Tested in 12 Months
risks.description: Risk associated with incident response plan not tested in 12 months.

findings.title: Finding: Session Timeout Not Configured for Web Application
findings.description: Verified session timeout now enforced at 15 minutes.

findings.title: Finding: Incident Response Plan Not Tested in 12 Months
findings.description: Last IR exercise was conducted 18 months ago.

findings.title: Finding: Incomplete Audit Log Retention Configuration
findings.description: Automated scan identified 4 log groups with non-compliant retention.

findings.title: Finding: Multifactor Authentication Not Enforced for All Privileged Users
findings.description: 3PAO testing confirmed 3 of 12 admin accounts lack MFA enrollment.

findings.title: Finding: Missing Vulnerability Scan Coverage for Container Images
findings.description: Assessment team confirmed no container scanning is performed pre-deployment.

findings.title: Finding: Encryption Key Rotation Not Automated
findings.description: Key rotation history shows manual rotation every 18 months, exceeding 12-month requirement.

poam-items.title: Multifactor Authentication Not Enforced for All Privileged Users
poam-items.description: Privileged accounts on legacy admin portal do not require MFA. Emergency access accounts bypass MFA controls.

poam-items.title: Incomplete Audit Log Retention Configuration
poam-items.description: CloudWatch log groups for application tier set to 90-day retention instead of required 365 days.

poam-items.title: Missing Vulnerability Scan Coverage for Container Images
poam-items.description: Container images in ECR are not scanned for vulnerabilities before deployment to production.

poam-items.title: Session Timeout Not Configured for Web Application
poam-items.description: Web application sessions do not expire after the required 15-minute idle timeout.

poam-items.title: Encryption Key Rotation Not Automated
poam-items.description: KMS customer-managed keys for database encryption are rotated manually instead of automatically.

poam-items.title: Incident Response Plan Not Tested in 12 Months
poam-items.description: The IR plan has not been exercised through tabletop or functional testing within the past year.
